title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 19–22, this part focuses on Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Grrr... I can't stand the bastard, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: That stupid Sanji decided that he'd-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Uwah! What a Bounteous, gigantic lobster!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at the gleaming radiance of that supple meat! That alone speaks vol- umes of the skill of the chef that prepared this dish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rich aromas of garlic and sea- food stock float through the air... I can't stop drooling!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 14 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
